message: docs: add mobile memory warning for vector search demo

files.patch:
@@ -12,7 +12,8 @@

TurboQuant Vector Search

Search 5K Wikipedia passages entirely in your browser. The search index is 1.2 MB instead of 7.7 MB.

Left: TurboQuant searches compressed vectors directly (no decompression). Right: brute-force on full float32 vectors. - Top results match. Borderline results near the cutoff may swap — that's the tradeoff for 6x less data.

+ Top results match. Borderline results near the cutoff may swap — that's the tradeoff for 6x less data. + Mobile: the embedding model (~23MB ONNX) may run out of memory after repeated queries — this is a Transformers.js limitation.
